displayName: Australia – Work & Holiday Visa (1 year Work & Travel)
title: Document Checklist
subtitle: Australia · Working Holiday (Subclass 417 / 462)
policyBanner: Subclass 417 (most countries) or 462 (specific passport countries). Confirm your client's passport country, age limit (18–30 or 35 for some countries), and that they have not previously held a WHM visa. India is not currently on the eligible passport list — verify latest Home Affairs list before taking the file.

items.title: Valid passport from eligible Working Holiday country
items.note: Check Home Affairs eligible passport list at time of application. Passport must be valid for entire intended stay.

items.title: Applicant age within limit (generally 18–30; up to 35 for select countries)
items.note: Age is assessed at time of application. Confirm subclass 417 vs 462 rules for passport country.

items.title: First Working Holiday Maker (WHM) visa — no prior WHM held
items.note: Second WHM may be possible only if client completed specified work in regional Australia on first WHM — separate pathway.

items.title: Valid passport bio page + previous Australian visa pages (if any)
items.note: Colour scan, all corners visible, no glare.

items.title: Digital photo per Home Affairs / ImmiAccount specifications
Not accompanied by dependent children at any time during stay
ImmiAccount created and online WHM application started
items.note: Subclass 417 or 462 selected correctly for passport country.

items.title: All application questions complete — consistent with supporting documents
items.note: Disclose all prior visas, refusals, and travel history honestly.

items.title: Biometrics completed if requested (VFS / ASC)
Health examinations completed if Home Affairs requests them
Police certificates from countries lived 12+ months since age 16 (if requested)
Proof of sufficient funds for initial stay (typically AUD $5,000+ or equivalent)
items.note: Bank statements showing consistent balance; explain large recent deposits.

items.title: Return/onward travel evidence or funds to purchase departure ticket
items.note: Officer must be satisfied applicant can support stay and depart Australia.

items.title: Brief travel / work plan (holiday intent, regions, timeline)
items.note: WHM is primarily holiday with incidental work — not full-time employment pathway.

items.title: Employment / study ties to home country documented
Adequate health insurance for entire stay in Australia
items.note: Overseas Visitor Health Cover (OVHC) or equivalent acceptable policy — verify current Home Affairs guidance.

items.title: Client briefed on WHM work restrictions (6-month employer limit, etc.)
items.note: Condition 8547 — generally cannot work for same employer more than 6 months unless exempt work.

items.title: Client briefed on study limit (generally up to 4 months study)
Tax File Number (TFN) and superannuation guidance provided after grant
Government visa fee paid; official receipt saved on file
items.note: Separate consultancy fee on invoice. Never commingle with government payment.

items.title: Client reviewed, signed, and dated this checklist
Quality review / QA sign-off — eligibility, funds, and forms cross-checked
Application lodged; ImmiAccount confirmation / TRN saved on client file
